svg.title: Semantic-TX transmitter — horizontal functional architecture
svg.desc: Six-stage left-to-right pipeline: audio capture, preprocessing, STT, semantic encoding, packet builder, and MQTT transport. STT connects down to OpenAI Whisper API, and MQTT transport connects down to a Raspberry Pi MQTT broker on ports 1883 and 8883.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the audio capture stage in this project')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the audio preprocessing stage in this project')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the speech-to-text stage in this project')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the semantic encoding stage in this project')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the packet builder stage in this project')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the MQTT transport stage in this project')
sendPrompt('How does OpenAI Whisper integrate with the STT stage in this project?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Raspberry Pi Mosquitto broker and its dual-port setup in this project')
